retrieval.note: identical retrieved_session_ids in both files; every comparison is within-sweep, paired by question_id

judge_panel_notes: majority with strictest-tie-break (judge-call.ts); judges run thinking-off: cheap deterministic votes, and JSON response_format is mutually exclusive with thinking on the qwen API. glm-4.7-flashx from the planning doc does not exist on OpenRouter; live slug z-ai/glm-4.7-flash registered instead. qwen3.5-flash resolves to the dated slug. Judge GLM votes stay unpinned (verdict-classification is quantization-insensitive relative to gen).

4.notes: THE BET. First-party DeepSeek provider pinned: the model's default cheapest route is an fp4 host, the documented quality-degradation trap.

6.notes: AMENDED pre-spend 2026-07-15: Z.ai does not serve glm-4.7-flash on OpenRouter; smoke run landed on Cloudflare (unknown quantization). Pinned DeepInfra bf16 (full-precision, same price) before any judged Cell 6 call.

7.notes: groundedness control; OpenAI first-party; null entries delete chat params the reasoning API rejects

D.notes: identical-config repeat of cell 4; drift-compare.ts quantifies the noise floor

gen_prompt: byte-identical to Gate S (gen-prompt.ts pin); only the model and the synthesis section content vary between cells

criteria.primary_pass_fail: Cell 4 vs Cell 1R, overall strict: delta >= +5.0pp AND exact two-sided McNemar p < 0.05 on paired rows
sink_checks: temporal-reasoning Cell 4 vs 1R net-positive with p < 0.05
guardrails_block_ship: missed-abstention on the 30 *_abs questions: no significant regression (Cell 4 vs 1R)
no significant strict regression on any non-targeted question type (Cell 4 vs 1R)
Cell D verdict-flip rate reported; primary discordant-pair analysis restated net of the measured floor
attribution_reported_not_gated: Cell 3 minus Cell 2R = note fix alone (same reader)
Cell 4 minus Cell 5 = notes under the new reader
criteria.on_failure: report as-is; no proxy rescue; the bet's falsification clause activates (pivot to representation work, not another reader)

cost_projection_usd.basis: gen_in 13314 tok/q, judge_in 189 tok/q measured from judge-synthesis-cell1-2026-07.json; thinking output estimated 2500 tok/q (V4-Flash/GLM), 1500 tok/q (nano)
cost_projection_usd.rule: if smoke-run token usage projects any cell materially above estimate, stop and re-project before continuing
